title: send_payment has 8 arguments suppressed by allow(too_many_arguments)
description: payment.rs send_payment takes 8 arguments with #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]. The arguments can be grouped into a SendPaymentRequest struct holding to_address, amount_zatoshi, session_id, network, and optionally params. This removes the lint suppression, improves call-site readability, and makes it easier to add future fields without growing the argument list further.
